input_material: fedaux materials under workspace-paper-review/bench-fixtures/materials/ (FedAux PDF + extracted text)
question: 请对 FedAux 论文执行完整的论文分析流程 (extract -> critic -> design -> spec), 各阶段产出在回复中内联返回。
rubric: All 4 stage outputs present with correct section templates. extract uses 12 sections, critic uses 7 sections, design uses 10 sections, spec uses 10 sections. No fabricated numbers.

question: 请只对 FedAux 执行 critic 和 design 阶段, 产出在回复中内联返回。
rubric: critic analysis has 7 sections; design has 10 sections including '自变量/控制变量/观测指标' and '如果问题成立/不成立'. No regression to single-stage templates.

question: 请只执行 extract 阶段并输出 12 节实验提取模板, 产出在回复中内联返回。
rubric: extract output uses 12-section template (## 0..## 11) with concrete numbers from the paper, missing info marked as '论文中未明确说明'.
